name: Melon-Citrus Mingle
recipeIngredient: Pineapple; peeled and cubed - or - large can (20 oz) pineapple chunks in its own juice
Bing cherries; pitted - or - jar of maraschino cherries (2 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Scoop out melon balls.
2. Peel and cube the remaining fruits.
3. Combine all ingredients in a large plastic container.
4. Stir gently to coat bananas with fruit juices and prevent darkening.
5. Cover tightly and chill well.
Note: May be stored in refrigerator for 1 week.
